questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Distributed Commit?
options: Inefficient scaling of Two-Phase Commit (2PC) coordinator failures.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Two-Phase Commit (2PC) coordinator failures.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Two-Phase Commit (2PC) coordinator failures scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
